chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-727 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 11 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 12.12.2025 Dr. Hafiz Maqsood Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Anum, APG Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG DSP Raza Mian Legal-I, SIP/IO Aida Pervaiz and SIP Muhammad Younis PS Malir City Karachi --------- Mr. Shoukat Ali Banbhro advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.7, which is taken on record. Pursuant to Court’s notice, alleged detainee Maryam has been produced by SIP/IO Aida Pervaiz and SIP Muhammad Younis PS Malir City Karachi. The detainee was inquired about her illegal detention. She stated in the Court that she has contracted marriage with respondent No.6 Muhammad Shafiq and she intends to reside with him, she has not been abducted or detained by any person. SIP/IO Aida Pervaiz and SIP Muhammad Younis PS Malir City Karachi submitted that FIR No.436/2025 u/s. 365-B/34 r/w 3TIP registered at Police Station Malir has been disposed of in `C` class and such report has been submitted before the Court concerned. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the alleged detainee Maryam is aged about 16 years, she is minor and cannot contract marriage. Since this Court is only seized with the matter with respect to the illegal detention of Maryam which per her own statement is not true. The petitioner is at liberty to pursue the matter where report under Section 173 Cr.PC has been submitted. The petition, having served its purpose, is disposed of.

The petitioner is at liberty to pursue the matter where report under Section 173 Cr.PC has been submitted. The petition, having served its purpose, is disposed of. The official respondents are directed to provide protection to the allege detainee Maryam and her husband as and when required. JUDGE Nadir*
